The '''''Tiger''''' was a [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 assault transport]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Assault Transport ''Tiger'' was part of, then, [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] [[Battle on the Frontier|campaign]] to bring the [[Pakuuni system/Legends|Pakuuni system]], along with the other [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim territories]] under Imperial control. The transport was on standby in the [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Ludwick]]'' to capture [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] fugitives aboard [[Cargo container/Legends|Cargo container]] ''[[CRM908A]]'' which was inside a base used by [[Pakuuni Pirates|Pirates]]. When ''[[Ludwick]]'' launched an [[Destruction of the Pakuuni Pirates|assault]] on the base to destroy it, [[Imperial Ace]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] scanned the containers to find the desired container. The assault transport was launched and boarded the container to arrest the Rebels. The Pirate stronghold was destroyed to pave way for the construction of [[XQ3 Platform]] ''[[NL-1]]'' in the [[Pakuuni system/Legends|Pakuuni system]].

The ''Tiger'' was used again with a second ship to board [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|Modified corvettes]] [[Z-Oz Group|''Z-Oz'']] to recover stolen [[Hyperdrive/Legends|Hyperdrive]] units from [[ZA-13]] during the [[Zaarin insurrection]].
